title: Workers Compensation (Permanent Disablement)(Commutation of Pension) Regulation, 2011

sections.heading: These Regulations maybe cited as the Workers Title
In these regulations, unless the context otherwise requires- Interpretation
sections.text:
"Commutation factors" means actuaral factors used to
determine the lump sum payable under section eighty-one
of the Act:
"earnings" has the meaning assigned to it in the Act;

sections.heading: For the purpose of section eighty-one of the Act, the Prescribed
sections.text:
prescribed amount shall be fifty thousand kwacha amount under
section
81 of Act

sections.heading: Alump sum payable to a worker pursuant to section eighty­ Calculation of
sections.text:
one of the Act for permanent disablement, shall be calculated in lump sum
accordance with the formula set out in the Schedule. payable for
permanent
disablement
SCHEDULE
(Regulation 4)
CALCULATION OF LUMP SUM PAYMENT
I. Fifty percent of the assessed earnings ofa worker who has suffered
pennanent disablement multiplied by the degree of disablement percentum
equals the monthly pension for disablement.

sections.heading: The annual pension ofa worker who has sufef red permanent disablement
sections.text:
multiplied by actuarial age factors equals the total commutation of the
pension for permanent disablement.
A.
